title: iOS 27 Might Have Just Confirmed Apple’s First Foldable iPhone
summary: However, the latest iOS 27 beta might reveal a new product Apple hasn't announced yet: the company's rumored foldable " iPhone Ultra ." What do you think Apple is going to call its foldable iPhone?
